title: GSR 330(E) Regarding Amendment of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Registration and Processing of Claims) Scheme, 1985
description: GSR 330(E) Regarding Amendment of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Registration and Processing of Claims) Scheme, 1985
text: REGD. NO. D.L.—33004/95 The Gazette Of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 156] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, APRIL 4, 1995/CHAITRA 14,1917 821 GI/95 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE, GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAQRDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3^] MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS (Department of Chemicals & Petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th March, 1995 G.S.R. 330(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 9 of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act. 1985 (21 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following scheme further to amend the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Registration and Processing of Claims) Scheme, 1985, namely :— 1. (i) This scheme may be called the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Registra- tion and Processing of Claims) Amendment Scheme, 1995; (ii) It shall come into force on the date of its publication in the Offi- cial Gazette. 2. In the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Registration and Processing of Claims) Scheme, 1995, in sub-paragraph (3) of paragraph 13 after the word "Commis- sioner" the following words shall be inserted, namely :— "or Commissioner-in-Charge in the absence of the Commissioner" [File No. 21|1|95-B. Cell] VINOD VA1SH, Jt. Secy. FOOT NOTE.—The principal scheme was published in Gazette of India Extra- ordinary vide G.S.R. No. 751 (E) dt, the 24th September, 1985 subsequently was amended vide G.S.R. 927(E) dt. the 19th November, 1987, G.S.R. No. 394 (F) dt. the 28th March, 1988 and G.S.R. 310(E) dt. the 5th March, 1992 and G.S.R: 910(E) dt; 2-12-1992 and G.S.R. 449(E) dt. 9-6-93. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Prrs;..
